nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 哥倫比亞西部山脈
nodes.summary: 哥倫比亞西部山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联21种鸟类，包括Cauca guan、Short-tailed hawk、大绿金刚鹦鹉等21种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Star-chested treerunner
nodes.summary: Star-chested treerunner（Star-chested treerunner，学名 Margarornis stellatus），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.evidence: It inhabits montane evergreen forest, where it favors areas heavy with moss and epiphytes

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "It is primarily threatened by rapid and ongoing deforestation in the Chocó region, largely owing to intensive logging, human settlement, cattle grazing, mining and coca and oil palm cultivation, with destruction particularly severe within its elevational range." It is considered locally common in Colombia and very rare and local in Ecuador
